contexts.text: Hi, Lingling. Did you travel this summer vacation?
No, I didn’t. I stayed in Beijing. I went to the National Library of China on foot and read books there.
That’s good. Did you also stay in Beijing, Maomao?
Yes, I did. I worked as a volunteer at China Science and Technology Museum.
Wonderful! When did you work there?
Is the museum far from your home? How did you get there?
Not too far. I went there by bus. Where did you go, Guoguo?
I went to Hubei to see my grandparents. I learned to take care of plants and animals.
Hubei is far from here. How did you get there?
Wow! All of us had a meaningful summer vacation.
Where did he/she go this summer vacation?
Lingling went to the National Library of China. Maomao went to China Science and Technology Museum. Guoguo went to Hubei.
Lingling read books. Maomao worked as a volunteer. Guoguo learned to take care of plants and animals.
Lingling went on foot. Maomao went by bus. Guoguo took a train.
Did you travel this summer vacation?
No, I didn’t. I stayed in Beijing.
Where did you go this summer vacation?
I went to the National Library of China.

Welcome to our School TV Show! This week, we will talk about our summer vacation. Hello, everyone! My name is Lingling. I’m from Class 1, Grade 6. My summer vacation was meaningful. I didn’t travel. I stayed in Beijing. I went to the National Library of China on foot and read books there. I also learned many new things.
All of us had a meaningful summer vacation.
Lingling went to the library on foot.
visit the National Library of China
I read books at the National Library of China.
volunteer at China Science and Technology Museum
Maomao worked at China Science and Technology Museum.
Did you travel this summer vacation?
No, I didn’t. I stayed in Beijing.
Did Lingling travel this summer vacation?
No, she didn’t. She stayed in Beijing.
Where did Maomao work as a volunteer?
He worked at China Science and Technology Museum.
How did Guoguo get to Hubei?
